name: Fire Formation - Gyokkou
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>炎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>えん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>舞</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぶ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－「<ruby lang="jp"><rb>玉</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ギョッ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>衝</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>コウ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>」
desc: Activate this card by targeting 1 Set Spell/Trap your opponent controls. Your opponent cannot activate the targeted card in response to this card's activation. While this card is face-up on the field, that Set card cannot be activated. All Beast-Warrior monsters you control gain 100 ATK.
eff: Activate this card by targeting 1 Set Spell/Trap your opponent controls. Your opponent cannot activate the targeted card in response to this card's activation. While this card is face-up on the field, that Set card cannot be activated. All Beast-Warrior monsters you control gain 100 ATK.

mst: Prevents activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
Prevents activation of your opponent's Trap Cards
